## About Kipps.AI [...] The platform includes intelligent call management features such as smart routing, automated scheduling, and escalation to human agents when necessary. Advanced analytics provide detailed insights into usage at both model and agent levels, with customizable reporting options for tracking performance metrics. Kipps.AI adheres to enterprise security standards and holds certifications such as SOC 2 Type II, ISO 27001, GDPR, HIPAA, and PCI DSS Level 1. results.title: Kipps.AI: AI Agents for Customer Conversations | Nishit Chittora posted on the topic | LinkedIn
results.content: Consumer businesses face a constant challenge: handling thousands of customer conversations for sales, support, and operations. Repetitive questions, missed calls outside of business hours, and overwhelmed staff during rush times can lead to lost opportunities and frustrated customers. Kipps.AI solves this by building human-like AI agents that work on your preferred channels, including phone, WhatsApp, and Instagram. Our agents can manage both inbound and outbound voice and chat, ensuring no conversation is missed. The result? Key Business Impact: - Complete automation of repetitive customer interactions - 24/7 availability ensures zero missed opportunities   - Handle thousands of concurrent conversations without staff expansion - Early adopters report 3x return on investment through [...] Hello. Today's customer support isn't a service anymore. It's more than that. It's competitive edge, yet traditional businesses. Hey, I'm Mr. Tara, co-founder of Pepsi and I am here to show you how and a turns this real problem into an opportunity. In banking sector, a support call means a wait time of 12 minutes. Banks spent millions of dollars in operations and yet create a complicated processes which pushes customers away. These aren't some small inefficiencies, these are the serious risk for the customers and businesses. This is where I keep saying presents you a voice agent. Our voice agent doesn't just answers your call, it changes how businesses do sales, customer support, and operations.
